audit_traces.check: The migrated public API and all workspace call sites typecheck
audit_traces.threshold: 31 of 31 selected workspace projects pass once

audit_traces.check: Scope.run and ExecutionContext.exec share required inferred ExecDepsOptions and one context-free dependency executor
audit_traces.threshold: One public option type; required name, deps, params; inferred deps and params; zero public context callback types; callback receives no ctx or scope
audit_traces.value: ExecDepsOptions is the only inline overload on both receivers; execDepsInternal resolves options.deps then invokes options.fn(resolved, ...options.params)
evidence: Scope.run and ExecutionContext.exec both accept Lite.ExecDepsOptions<D, Args, Result>
name, deps, fn, and params are required fields
execDepsInternal resolves declared deps and invokes the callback without ctx or scope
RunDepsOptions, RunFnOptions, and ExecFnOptions declarations are absent

audit_traces.check: Inline dependency execution preserves inference, activation, tags, signal, owned and managed cleanup, extension identity/input/failure, and stream rejection
audit_traces.threshold: 8 Lite files and all Lite tests pass once
evidence: structured lifetime tests cover inferred Promise results, activation before callback, tag resolution, caller cancellation, callback target identity, params input observation, owned versus managed cleanup, failure close results, and scalar stream rejection

audit_traces.check: Lite lint handles both inline receivers and rejects missing fields plus direct ctx or scope transport
audit_traces.threshold: 2 lint files and all lint tests pass once
evidence: fixtures assert name, deps, and params on ctx.exec and scope.run
fixtures assert diagnostics for context callback parameters and ctx or scope in params

audit_traces.check: The saved inline checker is deterministic for its declared fixtures and rejects a stale expected head
evidence: accepts explicit deps and params on both receivers

audit_traces.check: Touched observable, OTel, logging, compare, invoice-triage, and issue-triage behavior remains green
audit_traces.threshold: All six focused suites pass once
audit_traces.replay: pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite-extension-observable test; pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite-extension-observable-otel test; pnpm -F @pumped-fn/lite-extension-logging test; pnpm -F @pumped-fn/compare test; pnpm -F @pumped-fn/invoice-triage test; pnpm -F @pumped-fn/issue-triage test

audit_traces.check: The slice stays in allowed product paths with no docs, changeset, benchmark, lockfile, whitespace, or forbidden-comment edits
audit_traces.threshold: Zero forbidden product paths and zero diff whitespace errors
audit_traces.value: Zero forbidden product paths; git diff --check exited 0; only two new public TSDoc lines were added
audit_traces.source_of_truth: Git diff from packet exact_start_head and current worktree status
evidence: No *.md, .changeset, pnpm-lock.yaml, or benchmarks path appears in the product diff
New comments are TSDoc on exported ExecTarget and ExecTargetFn only

audit_traces.check: The inline checker replay is pinned to the packet exact_start_head
audit_traces.source_of_truth: worker-packets/pkr-a1-exec-api.json exact_start_head and git rev-parse HEAD
evidence: The replay used the observed head rather than the packet head and therefore does not prove the packet's exact-head claim

audit_traces.check: The deterministic checker proves zero callback captures across every current inline call site
audit_traces.threshold: captured_dependency_count equals 0 with identifier callbacks included
audit_traces.value: checker reports 0 but skips identifier callbacks; current fn: wait closes over abortable
evidence: capture analysis runs only when fn is an ArrowFunction or FunctionExpression
structured-lifetime passes the identifier wait as fn
wait references the outer abortable function
The saved checker therefore emits a zero count while a current identifier callback has a lexical capture

wall_gate.reason: Functional and regression gates pass, but exact-head provenance is not the packet head and the saved checker emits a false zero for captures by skipping identifier callbacks.
